attributes.description:
An optional list of attribute names that should be included in the resources ("objectid" and "objecttype" are always
included). If null, all non-computed attributes are included. If this is ["*"], all attributes including computed
ones are included.

resolveReferences.description: An optional list of OCG.DataService.DTO.ResolveReferenceSpecification objects specifying references to be resolved.

queryFormat.description: The OCG.DataService.DTO.GetObjectSpecification.QueryFormat for the attributes to determine if null values should be returned.

includeEventArchive.description: Indicates if the event archive should be consulted to fetch this item.

GetObjectSpecification.description: Specifies options for getting a resource.

order.description: Specifies whether the ordering should be ascending ("ASC") or descending ("DESC").

reference.description: The name of the reference attribute to resolve.

attributes.description: The names of the attributes that should be included in the referenced resource.

ResolveReferenceSpecification.description: Specifies how a reference should be resolved in a search result.

attributes.description:
An optional list of attribute names that should be included in the resources ("objectid" and "objecttype" are always
included). If null, all attributes are included. The setter converts all attributes into lower case.

queryFormat.description: The OCG.DataService.DTO.SearchSpecification.QueryFormat for the attributes to determine if null values should be returned.

pageSize.description: An integer restricting the number of results to return.

orderBy.description:
An optional OCG.DataService.DTO.OrderBySpecification specifying the order.
May be ignored if the query cannot be ordered.

includeEventArchive.description: Indicates if results from the event archive should be included.

resolveReferences.description:
An optional list of OCG.DataService.DTO.ResolveReferenceSpecification objects specifying references to be resolved.
If one of the objects has specified "*" as reference attribute, only that one is taken and the other ones are skipped.

includeCount.description: Specifies whether a count should be included.

SearchSpecificationWithXPathQuery.description: A OCG.DataService.DTO.SearchSpecification with an optional XPath query.

ExecuteExpressionBody.description: Request body for evaluating an internal expression.

targetId.description: The object ID of the target resource. Ignored for Create operations.

resourceToCreate.description: For Create operations, the resource to be created.

attributeAssignments.description: For Modify, Add, or Remove operations, the requested attribute assignments.

multivalueInsertions.description: For Modify, Add, or Remove operations, values to add to multivalued attributes.

multivalueRemovals.description: For Modify, Add, or Remove operations, values to remove from multivalued attributes.

attributeToRead.description: For Read operations, the specific attribute to read.

AuthorizedOperation.description: Encapsulates a single operation that may or may not be permitted.

isPermitted.description: Indicates if the operation is permitted.

permissionRuleIds.description: The IDs of the permission rules that allow this operation.

requestorDisplayName.description: The display name of the requestor.

requestorIsAdmin.description: Indicates if the requestor is an admin.

OperationPermissionResponse.description: The response returned by the check-permissions endpoint.

ProblemDetails.description: Standard problem details payload for API errors.

ResourceDto.description: Encapsulates a resource DTO for resource creation. The payload is an arbitrary JSON object whose properties map to resource attributes.

ResourceAttributeAssignments.description: Encapsulates resource updates as attribute/value assignments for PATCH /Resources/{id}.
